free_text: Study of the (d,3He) reaction on 84Kr and 86Kr and the
lowest moments of the proton strength distributions in
the Zr region
99.99% enriched 84Kr and 86Kr gases were kept at a
pressure of about 400 mbar in a cylindrical gas cell of
7 cm diameter with windows consisting of 3 mg/cm2 thick
Havar foils.
A polarimeter monitored the beam polarization
(Py=0.50+-0.03) during the measurements.
The reaction products were detected with six
silicon surface barrier counter telescopes (300 mu-m +
2000 mu-m each) mounted symmetrically with respect to
the beam axis.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
